title: BrightBlue Multi Bottle Opener, Multi-Function Jar Grip Opener, 5-in-1 and 6-in-1, Twist Off Lid Kitchen Tool Suitable for Seniors or Arthritic Hands (2Pcs)
features: ❤【6-in-1 jar opener】--Ergonomic & non slip design made of high quality plastic and silicon - help you to open most of existing jar or bottle lids. Open pop tabs, pull tabs, bags, safety seals, metal and plastic bottle caps, jars, and more with next to no effort.

❤【5-in-1 bottle opener】--Can open lips for the bean cans, covers of the pickle bottles & caps of the sodas & soft drinks. Easily twist off screw caps with a simple twist. Clamp down on food seals to instantly remove pull tabs.

❤【energy saving design 】-- Ideal for arthritic hands, seniors, anyone with limited hand strength, anyone with long fingernails, and anyone looking for a better, faster, easier way to open all of the sealed containers in their kitchen.
❤【Saving space】--Will not take up too much space, the jar opener and bottle opener is easy to clean. Can also be hang on hooks for easy access.

❤【Safety and quality assurance】-- we are dedicated to address any product and service issues, who is committed to delivering a 5 star experience for all buyers. If you're not satisfied with our multi bottle can jar opener, please return for a full refund. No risk, order now!
description: Specification: Material:high quality plastic, silicon and stainless steel Size:6in1 Multi-jar opener(5.75x2.4 inch) 5in1 Multi-bottle opener(5.75x2.26 inch) Package included: 1*6in1 Multi-jar opener 1*5in1 Multi-bottle opener Product Features: 1.Cleaning is extremely simple, either by using dishwasher or hand. 2.Designed with compact size, they do not occupy too much kitchen space and are very convenient to store. 3.Open pop tabs, pull tabs, bags, safety seals, metal and plastic bottle caps, jars, and more with next to no effort. 4.Ergonomic, rubber non-slip grip (no slippage even with wet hands). The 5-in-1 Multi-bottle opener features 1) a bottle opener (for traditional glass bottles) 2) a screw-top opener (for plastic screw-top bottles) 3) a pull tab hook (for pull tabs, e.g. tin of cat food) 4) a pop tab hook (for pop tabs, e.g. soda cans) 5) a "jar hook" that breaks the container's vacuum-seal, making the lid easy to twist off. The 6-in-1 Multi-jar opener features 1) a hidden blade for opening bags 2) a clamp for opening safety seals (e.g. on a new ketchup bottle) 3) a pull tab hook 4) a pop tab hook 5) a handle that grips tight lids for easy twist-off 6) a bottle opener
